novel_features.name: Browser-backed account dashboard reads
novel_features.description: Read Squarespace account dashboard domains, website summaries, domain DNS records, email forwarding, registrar metadata, and per-website domain linkage using a logged-in browser session cookie.

novel_features.name: Friendly site aliases
novel_features.description: Use site, website, pages, and store-pages aliases over the generated Commerce API website profile and store pages endpoints.
